title: Sour Juicy Cozy Norwegian Ground Beef Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly meal that combines ground beef with tangy flavors to create a cozy and delicious dish.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat.
Add ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as needed. Remove from heat when done.
In the same pan, add onion and garlic. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Mix in tomato paste followed by vinegar. Let it simmer for about 1 minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Return ground beef back into the pan along with a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook for an additional minute or two, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
